query: My JasperReport is showing #PDF error in production but works in Jaspersoft Studio. How do I debug the datasource connection issue?

Create a font extension JAR so that our custom sans-serif font renders correctly in PDF exports on Linux servers.
Exporting a report with 500k rows causes an OutOfMemoryError. How do I implement streaming export or pagination to avoid loading everything into memory?
This subreport compiles fine but renders empty during PDF export. The datasource query returns data when run directly.
Build a Spring Boot REST endpoint that returns a paginated list of orders with filtering and sorting support.
Help me design the aggregate roots for a reservation system using event-driven context mapping between bounded contexts.
Fix the N+1 query problem in our JPA entity mapping where lazy-loaded collections are being fetched one at a time.
Scrape the pricing table from example.com and return it as structured JSON that I can import into our system.
